chunks.title: The Parable of the Two Eagles and the Vine
chunks.reason: A complete allegorical narrative involving two eagles and a vine, including the rhetorical questions explaining its outcome.

chunks.title: Interpretation of the Parable and Judgment
chunks.reason: The prophet explains the historical meaning regarding Babylon and Judah, followed by a declaration of Yahweh's judgment.

chunks.title: Oracle of Restoration for the Cedar
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic promise regarding a new sprig from the cedar and the universal recognition of Yahweh's power.
